title: Normalize or retire the skipped Bureau Codex bridge
goal: Resolve the enabled but condition-skipped and drifted Codex bridge lane through one reviewed canonical normalization or a rollback-bound retirement without weakening Bureau Core, closure or frontier authority.

acceptance.assertion: Current timer, service, drop-ins, backend path, last output and known consumers are re-read immediately before any effect.
The change chooses either one canonical executable service contract or explicit scheduled-lane retirement; mixed live/repository definitions do not remain.
Current unit bytes and enablement state are captured and a tested rollback path is bound to the exact effect.
The target is proven as a one-shot before timer mutation and observed across at least two expected cycles after effect.
Bureau check, doctor, registry-truth, closure and agent frontier remain healthy and no automatic dispatch or merge authority is introduced.
